message.content:
Subject: Apology for Your Delayed Shipment and Resolution

Dear [Customer's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. First and foremost, I want to sincerely apologize for the delay in your recent shipment. We truly value your business and understand how frustrating this must have been for you.

The delay was due to unexpected issues at our shipping partner's distribution center, which affected a number of orders last week. Our team worked diligently to resolve it as quickly as possible, and your package has now been delivered (or is en route with updated tracking below).

To make this right, we're offering you a full refund of 20% on your order total, which will be processed automatically to your original payment method within the next 3-5 business days. Additionally, we'd like to provide a $15 store credit for your next purchase as a gesture of goodwill.

If there's anything else we can do to assist, please don't hesitate to reply to this email or call our support line at 1-800-123-4567. Thank you for your patience and continued support—we look forward to serving you again soon.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
Customer Service Manager  
[Your Company Name]  
[Your Contact Information]  
[Tracking Number: ABC123456789, if applicable]
